description: Capability for all app windows (launcher + per-Space windows — ADR-0011). Uses "*" so dynamically-created Space windows (label "space-{uuid}") inherit the same ACL as the statically-configured "main" window. Per Tauri v2 docs, glob patterns like "space-*" are supported in theory, but "*" is the documented "all app windows" pattern and avoids any glob-matching ambiguity at build time.
